calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2018 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Prove Up Hearing Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Distribute, Inc., a corporation, fka DISTRIBU.TD, INC., fka MMK LABS, INC.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Daniel Franksten, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Englewood Marketing Group, Inc., a corporation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Distribute, Inc., a corporation, fka DISTRIBU.TD, INC., fka MMK LABS, INC.
Plaintiff's complaint for common counts/open book was filed on October 30, 2017 and served on November 16, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant on May 7, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 7, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 15, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Englewood Marketing Group, Inc., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Distribute, Inc., a corporation, fka DISTRIBU.TD, INC., fka MMK LABS, INC., as follows:

Principal - $40,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,405.47.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $587.65.

Total - $46,193.12.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2018 Continued To Nov-28-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
